features.name: Snippet Creation and Editing
features.description: Rich text editor with syntax highlighting, language detection, and auto-save for code snippets

features.name: Dropbox Sync Integration
features.description: Automated sync of snippets and metadata to Dropbox using SDK with conflict resolution and offline support

features.name: Tag-based Organization
features.description: Hierarchical tag system with auto-complete, bulk tagging, and tag-based filtering and search

features.name: Full-Text Search Engine
features.description: SQLDelight-powered full-text search across snippet content, tags, and metadata with relevance ranking

features.name: Markdown Rendering
features.description: Live Markdown preview with code block syntax highlighting, Mermaid diagram support, and export to PDF/HTML
